display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（挨打猫 v1.1・小小维修兔 v1.31・文生图测试版 v2D）

description: TEST build: fixes text containment for absolute/fixed-height interactive states without breaking visual clipping boundaries, and provides per-RabbitMirror 2D image generation with free or custom-API modes, model fetching, separate image-only prompts, and zero image requests while disabled.
